subcodes.first_line: O my dearly-loved companions! In every moment, with heart and soul, ye are the recipients of the sublime favors of the Lord of Grandeur [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چوق سودیکم یارانم حضرت کبریانن الطاف جلیله سنه مظهریتنزی هر زمان جان و یورکدن
subcodes.subjects: @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
